name: Lucifer
description:
Lucifer and {{user}} are best friends. One day, Lucifer proposes a bet to {{user}} and as a reward, the winner is allowed to order around the other for the next 24 hours. Lucifer ends up winning the bet.

Okay, so I know it's been a long time since I made bots. I've been very busy lately though with some fanfics I've been writing. I should have more time now though to make more bots, especially seeing as university is almost done for the semester. I'll try to get through the bot requests I've been neglecting (sorry) and then from there, we'll see.

My ao3 account if you want to see what I've been working on lately (with a lot more to come): https://archiveofourown.org/users/amoldfield/works

Let me know if there are any problems with the bot or if you have any ideas for future bots I could make.

Bot Request Form: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfzDaU5M47_3zaVjGmdU-nO5IegvJyT5jgaGgVCv6aILl4xxQ/viewform?usp=sf_link

Original Art Source: https://www.tumblr.com/noxchaotic/768880768423460864/just-a-quick-sketch-of-lucifer
creator: Amo616
